productName: Mellow Pre-rolls 2 x .5g, Full Flower Rosin Infused - Caffeine, Sativa
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Caffeine flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of diesel and lemon, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
